multiFileUpload.dropzoneHintText: Drag and drop files here or

uploadedFiles.title: Uploaded files
uploadedFiles.hint: Select the file name to open a copy in a new tab.

errors.fileTooLarge: File must not be larger than 10mb
errors.onlyPdf: Only PDF files can be uploaded

phaseBanner.feedbackText: This is a new service. Help us improve it and
phaseBanner.feedbackLinkTextHTML: give your feedback by email.

chooseUpload.title: How do you want to upload your evidence screen?

allAtOnce.hint: Upload evidence all at once, without associating it to specific work items or disbursements

associatedToLineItems.hint: Upload evidence individually, and associate specific evidence with individual work items or disbursements. This makes it less likely that your claim will be ejected due to a lack of documentation

error.empty: Select how you want to upload your evidence

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.p1: If you typed the web address, check it is correct.
notFound.p2: If you pasted the web address, check you copied the entire address.

internalServerError.title: Sorry, there is a problem with the service

uploadEvidenceIndividually.title: Upload evidence individually
uploadEvidenceIndividually.examples: Examples of evidence include: a single court order, a bundle of court orders, court attendance notes.

reusingDocuments.p: You can upload a document once and apply it to multiple work items.

namingFiles.p1: Files often have long, meaningless names, but if you rename them to an understandable name it will make it easier for us to assess your case.
namingFiles.p2: For example, interim-hearing-court-order.pdf instead of file23.pdf.

fileUploadForLineItem.p1: You can upload evidence that applies to:
fileUploadForLineItem.ul1: several line items, and reuse it for other line items later

examplesOfEvidence.title: Examples of evidence
examplesOfEvidence.courtOrders: A single court order, or a bundle of court orders
examplesOfEvidence.invoices: A single disbursement invoice, or a bundle of invoices

error.empty: Select how many clients are retained

poaClaimType.title: What type of POA are you claiming?

error.empty: Select what type of POA you are claiming

clientStatus.title: What is your client’s party status?

firstSolicitor.title: Are you the first solicitor firm acting on this case?

error.empty: Select yes if you are the first solicitor firm acting on this case

transferOfSolicitor.title: Has there been a transfer of solicitor on this case?

error.empty: Select yes if there has been a transfer of solicitor on this case

multipleClientHearings.title: Have you attended at least one hearing where you have represented more than one client?

error.empty: Select yes if you have attended at least one hearing where you have represented more than one client.

numberOfClientsStartOfCase.title: How many clients did you have at the start of the case?

error.empty: Select how many clients you had at the start of the case

submissionSuccessful.title: Payment on account submitted
submissionSuccessful.p1: We are processing this POA and you will receive a decision shortly.

profitCostBillLine.title: POA CPGFS profit cost bill line
profitCostBillLine.netProfitCost: Actual net profit cost excluding advocacy

errors.invalid: Activity date must be a real date
errors.future: Activity date must be today or in the past

incomplete.day: Activity date must include a day
incomplete.month: Activity date must include a month
incomplete.year: Activity date must include a year
incomplete.dayAndMonth: Activity date must include a day and month
incomplete.dayAndYear: Activity date must include a day and year
incomplete.monthAndYear: Activity date must include a month and year

errors.invalid: Actual net value must be a number
errors.pence: Actual net value must include pence, like 123.45 or 156.00

errors.invalid: Fee earner name must only include letters a to z, and special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes

errors.empty: Enter a description of the expert cost
errors.invalid: Description must only include letters a to z, and special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes

escapingFixedFee.title: Escaping the standard fixed fee
escapingFixedFee.p1: Some cases escape the standard fixed fee. For example, cases where:
escapingFixedFee.ul1: your client is an unsuccessful joined party
escapingFixedFee.ul2: the acting solicitor has been instructed for less than 24 hours overall and their involvement in the case has concluded
escapingFixedFee.ul3: your profit costs have exceeded the escape threshold.
escapingFixedFee.p2: This is not an exhaustive list.
escapingFixedFee.p3: If we assess your claim and find that you have not escaped the standard fixed fee, you may have to repay any overpayments.
escapingFixedFee.question: Do you wish to escape the standard fixed fee?

error.empty: Select yes if you wish to escape the standard fixed fee
